DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA ANDERSON--OPERATION RISK CONSULTANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOWLIS, REBECCA V IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
